Component.HelpFileName: =(Iif(Fields!Include_Tax_In_Price.Value = 0, Iif(isNothing(Sum(Fields!net_amount.Value)),Nothing, Sum(Fields!net_amount.Value)) + CDec(ReportItems!net_amount1.Value), Sum(Fields!Price_Before_Tax.Value)) + iif(isnothing(Fields!SumTotalSurcharge.Value), 0, Fields!SumTotalSurcharge.Value) + Sum(Fields!sales_tax1.Value) + Sum(Fields!sales_tax2.Value) + Fields!misc.Value + Fields!freight.Value- Fields!prepaid.Value)
